title: Passkey recovery audit: zero accounts compromised
deployed_facts: An independent security audit of the passkey recovery flow concluded with zero accounts compromised
The audit covered every passkey recovery event from account launch through November 2025
No user action is required as a result of the audit
Audit methodology and scope are published on the Infinex security page
Recovery continues to work the same way it did before the audit
obstacle: any post about security defaults to alarm cadence; reader expects to be told to rotate, re-verify, or act. The fact set offers no such action — the post must land calm.
not_the_point: rallying users to do something. There is nothing to do.
